specific_question: By June 12, 2025, how many major leasing equipment agreements had Olivia Martinez renewed to maintain Elexion Automotive's production capacity?
answer: According to internal data, by June 12, 2025, Olivia Martinez had renewed 54 major equipment leasing agreements to support ongoing production operations at Elexion Automotive.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
